Name: TickTick Focus
Description: Unofficial, independent plugin — not affiliated with or endorsed by TickTick. Control and mirror your TickTick focus/pomodoro from a single smart button. Start a 25-minute focus, pause/resume with the same click, and start the 5-minute break when focus ends. Detects focus started or paused on another device and shows the live remaining time (MM:SS) on your Ulanzi Deck. Your data stays private: only a session token is stored locally, and the plugin talks directly to TickTick — never to a third-party server.

Actions.Name: Focus
Actions.Tooltip: Start, pause, resume and mirror your TickTick focus timer.

Localization.disclaimer: 🔒 Unofficial plugin, not affiliated with TickTick. Your data stays private — it never leaves your Mac except to talk directly to TickTick.
Localization.loginHelp: Opens a small TickTick window. Log in normally — the session is captured automatically. Nothing is stored except the session token.
Localization.tokenHelp: From ticktick.com → dev tools → Application/Storage → Cookies → copy the value of t.
Localization.durationHint: Leave at 0 to use your TickTick pomodoro preferences.
